paragraphs.en: Insects may become a crucial protein source as the global population grows and traditional meat production strains environmental limits. Two billion people worldwide already include insects in their diets, a practice known as entomophagy. Western cultures are slowly overcoming their squeamishness as sustainability concerns mount.
paragraphs.zh: 随着全球人口增长和传统肉类生产给环境带来压力，昆虫可能成为关键的蛋白质来源。全球已有二十亿人将昆虫纳入饮食，这种做法被称为食虫。随着可持续性担忧加剧，西方文化正在慢慢克服对此的厌恶。

paragraphs.en: The environmental advantages of insect farming are remarkable. Crickets produce eighty times less methane than cattle while requiring significantly less land, water, and feed. Insects can be raised on organic waste streams, converting agricultural byproducts into high-quality protein with minimal environmental footprint.
paragraphs.zh: 昆虫养殖的环境优势是显著的。蟋蟀产生的甲烷比牛少八十倍，同时需要的土地、水和饲料也大大减少。昆虫可以利用有机废物流养殖，将农业副产品转化为高质量蛋白质，环境足迹最小。

paragraphs.en: Nutritionally, insects offer impressive profiles comparable to conventional meat. Many species provide complete proteins containing all essential amino acids. Crickets and mealworms are rich in iron, zinc, and B vitamins. Some insects even contain healthy fats similar to those found in fish.
paragraphs.zh: 从营养上讲，昆虫提供的营养成分与传统肉类相当。许多物种提供含有所有必需氨基酸的完全蛋白质。蟋蟀和黄粉虫富含铁、锌和B族维生素。一些昆虫甚至含有与鱼类中发现的相似的健康脂肪。

paragraphs.en: Food technology companies are developing products that incorporate insect protein without triggering disgust responses. Protein powders, energy bars, and pasta made from cricket flour offer familiar formats. These processed products allow consumers to gain nutritional benefits while avoiding confrontation with whole insects.
paragraphs.zh: 食品科技公司正在开发含有昆虫蛋白但不会引发厌恶反应的产品。蟋蟀粉制成的蛋白粉、能量棒和意大利面提供了熟悉的形式。这些加工产品允许消费者获得营养益处，同时避免与整只昆虫的直接接触。

paragraphs.en: Regulatory frameworks for insect foods are evolving as the industry expands. The European Union has approved several insect species for human consumption, signaling mainstream acceptance. Cultural attitudes shift slowly, but growing environmental awareness may accelerate adoption among consumers seeking sustainable alternatives to conventional protein sources.
paragraphs.zh: 随着行业扩张，昆虫食品的监管框架正在发展。欧盟已批准多种昆虫供人类食用，标志着主流接受。文化态度转变缓慢，但日益增长的环境意识可能会加速寻求传统蛋白质来源可持续替代品的消费者的采用。
